prompt:
Create a luxury real-estate advertising poster for 雅颂花园 / GARDEN VILLA, using a cinematic high-end villa aesthetic. Canvas: vertical 2:3 poster, dark bronze, champagne gold, smoky taupe, and black palette, elegant and atmospheric, suitable as a premium PPT background. Composition: the top third shows an upside-down glowing night city skyline, with dense skyscrapers and warm window lights hanging from the top edge like a reflection; at the exact top center, a luminous faceted crystal tower/chandelier descends downward, aligned to the central axis. The middle area is a soft misty empty gradient with subtle vertical guide lines and a thin gold rectangular frame containing refined Chinese sales copy. The lower left contains a modern glass-box villa on a hillside at night, warm interior lighting, terrace, trees, and reflective dark water. The lower right and sweeping across the bottom is one large golden long-exposure light trail arc, like a highway or orbital ribbon, curving from the right edge toward the foreground and creating motion and prestige. Background behind the bottom area: distant mountains, city lights, haze, and sunset glow.

Typography and text: use thin, widely spaced, elegant serif/sans-serif Chinese typography in white and champagne gold. Include exactly these visible text groups: 1) top-left logo: a simple gold floral emblem plus “雅颂花园” and “GARDEN VILLA”; 2) top-right slogan: “花园墅境 · 臻品人生” above “GARDEN VILLA”; 3) central framed copy: “一座花园的私藏 / 一生风景的归心”, then “建面约”, then highlighted gold “280-560㎡”, then “城市花园别墅”, with a small capsule label “中国·杭州”; 4) vertical center title running downward: large Chinese characters “花 / 间 / 岁 / 月 / 归 / 心 / 所 / 向”, with tiny spaced Romanization letters between them reading “GARDEN VILLA HANG ZHOU”; 5) bottom contact bar: “Vip Line 0571 8888 9999”, a project address line “项目地址 / 杭州市西湖区之江板块·花园别墅区”, and the price block “总价约 1600 万起”; 6) a very small legal disclaimer line across the bottom edge. Keep all text crisp, minimal, and aligned, with no extra large headings.

Visual style: photorealistic architectural visualization mixed with luxury poster design, cinematic haze, soft bloom, premium gold foil feeling, high contrast but restrained, subtle paper grain, precise symmetrical layout, no people, no cars, no clutter, no cartoon style. Emphasize aspirational property branding, calm empty space, and refined luxury.

Create a luxury real-estate advertising poster for 雅颂花园 / GARDEN VILLA, using a cinematic high-end villa aesthetic. Canvas: vertical 2:3 poster, dark bronze, champagne gold, smoky taupe, and black palette, elegant and atmospheric, suitable as a premium PPT background. promptZh:
创作一张奢华房地产广告海报，用于 雅颂花园 / GARDEN VILLA，采用电影级高端别墅美学。画布：2:3 竖版海报，色调为深古铜色、香槟金、烟灰色与黑色，优雅且富有氛围感，适合作为高端 PPT 背景。构图：上方三分之一处展示倒置的璀璨夜景天际线，密集的摩天大楼与温暖的窗灯如倒影般悬挂在顶部边缘；正上方中心处，一座发光的切面水晶塔/吊灯沿中心轴向下延伸。中部区域为柔和朦胧的留白渐变，带有细微的垂直引导线，以及一个包含精致中文销售文案的细长金色矩形边框。左下方展示一座位于山间的现代玻璃盒子别墅，配有温暖的室内灯光、露台、树木及反光的深色水面。右下方及横跨底部的区域是一条巨大的金色长曝光光轨弧线，如同高速公路或轨道丝带，从右侧边缘向前景弯曲，营造出动感与尊贵感。底部背景：远山、城市灯光、薄雾与夕阳余晖。

排版与文字：使用纤细、宽间距、优雅的衬线/无衬线中文字体，颜色为白色与香槟金。包含以下可见文本组：1) 左上角 Logo：一个简单的金色花卉徽标，下方标注“雅颂花园”与“GARDEN VILLA”；2) 右上角标语：“花园墅境 · 臻品人生”，下方标注“GARDEN VILLA”；3) 中央边框文案：“一座花园的私藏 / 一生风景的归心”，随后是“建面约”，接着是高亮的金色“280-560㎡”，以及“城市花园别墅”，配有一个小胶囊标签“中国·杭州”；4) 垂直居中标题向下延伸：“花 / 间 / 岁 / 月 / 归 / 心 / 所 / 向”，字间穿插极小的罗马拼音字母“GARDEN VILLA HANG ZHOU”；5) 底部联系栏：“Vip Line 0571 8888 9999”、项目地址行“项目地址 / 杭州市西湖区之江板块·花园别墅区”以及价格区块“总价约 1600 万起”；6) 底部边缘一行极小的法律免责声明。保持所有文字清晰、极简且对齐，避免使用过大的标题。

视觉风格：照片级真实建筑可视化与奢华海报设计相结合，电影级薄雾、柔光效果、高级金箔质感、高对比度但克制，带有细微纸张纹理，精确的对称布局，无人物，无车辆，无杂乱元素，非卡通风格。强调向往感、宁静的留白与精致的奢华感。
